Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf Petros Megesteab Asghedom'Sfurther Responses To Interrogatories And Production Requests And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; ;
Off Calendar May-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, Defendant Ampco System Parking's motion to compel further responses to interrogatories, production and for sanctions, is taken off calendar, at the request of the moving party. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Pltf'S Responses To Firm And Special Interrogatories And Request For Documents; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
1. Cross Defendant King Security Services' Motion for order compelling plaintiff's responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production; granted:
d. All objections are waived, except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
e. Within five days of the date of service of this order, plaintiff shall serve full, complete and verified responses to cross-defendant King Security Services' form interrogatories (set one), special interrogatories (set one) and request for production of documents (set one)
2. Request for monetary sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within 30 days. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
